chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-946 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 15-09-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. Syed Naveed Ali Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
